title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Mexico’s latest cartel violence prompts fears of ‘narcoterrorism’ in replay 1990s Colombia
items.description: The Mexican army killed the country’s most powerful cartel leader and one of the United States’ most wanted fugitives on Sunday, notching a major vict...

items.title: How ‘dumb money’ took over stock markets: $5.4 trillion of retail activity took place in 2025
items.description: All told, money coming into the market from individual investors jumped about 50% from 2023 to early 2025, JPMorgan found.

items.title: Self-driving taxis hit London, a city with such complex streets that it has a ‘Knowledge’ test that takes cabbies years to pass
items.description: Self-driving taxis are “a solution looking for a problem,” said Steven McNamara, general secretary of the Licensed Taxi Drivers' Association.

items.title: Blockbuster ratings start to vindicate NBC’s $7.75 billion bet on the Olympics
items.description: NBC averaged 24 million viewers across its prime afternoon coverage and Primetime in Milan, a 94% improvement over the 2022 Beijing Games.

items.title: Northeast Corridor gathers snow at 3 inches an hour as National Weather Service calls traffic ‘nearly impossible’
items.description: Blizzard warnings stretched from Maryland to Maine, while over 5,000 flights were canceled.
